entities.name: FARMER MANAGED NATURAL REGENERATION
entities.description: A set of practices farmers use to foster the growth of indigenous trees on agricultural land

entities.name: INDIGENOUS TREES
entities.description: Trees native to the local environment fostered through FMNR

entities.name: REPUBLIC OF NIGER
entities.description: The country where the study on FMNR was conducted

entities.name: REGION OF MARADI
entities.description: A specific region in Niger covering 42,000 square kilometers

entities.name: PRUNING
entities.description: A practice involving the cutting of branches to encourage growth, used in FMNR

entities.name: PROTECTING WOODY VEGETATION
entities.description: A practice of safeguarding woody plants from destruction, used in FMNR

entities.name: SOIL TYPE
entities.description: A physical characteristic of the land that influences the adoption of FMNR

entities.name: MARKET ACCESS
entities.description: The ability of farmers to reach markets, influencing FMNR adoption

entities.name: EDUCATION LEVEL
entities.description: The level of schooling of the head of household, influencing FMNR adoption

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD INCOME
entities.description: The total annual gross income of rural households

entities.name: CROP DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of different crops grown on agricultural land

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD MIGRATION RATES
entities.description: The rate at which members of a household move to other locations

entities.name: TREE DENSITY
entities.description: The number of trees per unit area on farmland

entities.name: TREE DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of tree species present on farmland

entities.name: RURAL LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The means of securing the basic necessities of life for rural populations

entities.name: REFORESTATION
entities.description: The process of replanting an area with trees

entities.name: TREE PLANTING
entities.description: The act of planting tree seedlings, often used in reforestation
